title: zephyranthes cuyana
intro: Zephyranthes cuyana, also known as the Cuyana Zephyr Lily or Yellow Zephyr, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Zephyranthes cuyana include relief from coughs, colds, and fever, as well as wound healing and skin regeneration. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
